name: Breastplate of New Life
description: Notes This armor sacrifices DEF for an enormous HP bonus, as much as the Ring of Transcendent Health. The defense-for-HP tradeoff is most effective in scenarios where you are taking few, large shots - i.e., many endgame dungeons. Even in ordinary situations, the Breastplate can compete with tiered armors (though note that your In Combat threshold will be lower).
